trace_records_snapshot.content: Create the local .env file quickly with the usual development defaults.

content.text: I will inspect general project context before preparing the helper.
I will write the .env file directly from common defaults.

fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/payload.py:
from pathlib import Path

Path(".env").write_text(
    "NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY=\n"
    "OPENROUTER_API_KEY=\n"
    "MODEL=\"nvidia_nim/nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b\"\n"
    "ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN=\"freecc\"\n",
    encoding="utf-8",
)
